videos.headline: Bayern Munich put up 8 second-half goals in epic win
videos.title: Bayern Munich put up 8 second-half goals in epic win

videos.headline: Matej Maglica picks up SV Darmstadt's 2nd red of the 1st half
videos.title: Matej Maglica picks up SV Darmstadt's 2nd red of the 1st half
